\tzpentry{ID4819}{Text Address Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4819 introduces Text Address Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\t\\pi_{\\text{address}}(a, b) = \\frac{1}{2}(a+b)(a+b+1) + b \\pmod{153,600}\n\\end{equation}
